note: Converted main-thread KeyboardInterrupt into a shared VVRP cancellation event; ICMP reply waits and ping intervals are now cancellable, ping prints partial statistics, and CMD returns to the prompt without terminating VVRP
decisions: Keep cancellation in VVRP runtime control rather than making ICMP depend on CMD
Wait on a CMD completion event instead of interrupting Thread.join on Windows
